scripts.dev:webapp:3004: bash ./scripts/dev/dev-free-ports.sh 3004 && pnpm --dir app-webapp exec next dev --turbopack --port 3004
scripts.dev:admin:local-auth: bash ./scripts/dev/dev-free-ports.sh 3001 && AUTH_OIDC_CLIENT_ID=praedixa-webapp AUTH_APP_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3001 pnpm --dir app-admin exec next dev --turbopack --port 3001
scripts.dev:data:push-tabular: cd app-api && uv run python -m scripts.push_tabular_source
scripts.dev:data:drain-connection: cd app-api && uv run python -m scripts.drain_connector_connection
scripts.test: pnpm workspaces:check:critical-tests && pnpm test:root && pnpm test:workspaces
scripts.test:root:prepare: pnpm --filter @praedixa/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @praedixa/ui build && pnpm --filter @praedixa/api-hooks build
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 pnpm exec playwright test --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:landing: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=landing pnpm exec playwright test --project=landing --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:webapp: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=webapp pnpm exec playwright test --project=webapp --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:webapp:timeline: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=webapp pnpm exec playwright test testing/e2e/webapp/timeline-regression.spec.ts --project=webapp --workers=1 --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:webapp:visual: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=webapp pnpm exec playwright test testing/e2e/webapp/visual-qa-premium.spec.ts --project=webapp --workers=1 --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:admin: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=admin,webapp pnpm exec playwright test --project=admin --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:admin:cross-app: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=admin,webapp pnpm exec playwright test testing/e2e/admin/cross-app-session-isolation.spec.ts --project=admin --workers=1 --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=webapp,admin pnpm exec playwright test testing/e2e/webapp/smoke.spec.ts testing/e2e/admin/smoke.spec.ts --project=webapp --project=admin --workers=1 --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:critical: pnpm build:landing && pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_SERVER_MODE=production PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=landing pnpm exec playwright test testing/e2e/landing/booking.spec.ts --project=landing --workers=1 --reporter=list && pnpm build:webapp && pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_SERVER_MODE=production PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=webapp pnpm exec playwright test testing/e2e/webapp/smoke.spec.ts testing/e2e/webapp/api-edge-cases.spec.ts --project=webapp --workers=1 --reporter=list && pnpm build:admin && pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_SERVER_MODE=production PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=admin pnpm exec playwright test testing/e2e/admin/smoke.spec.ts testing/e2e/admin/access-control.spec.ts --project=admin --workers=1 --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:coverage: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 COVERAGE=1 pnpm exec playwright test --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:ci: CI=1 COVERAGE=1 pnpm exec playwright test --workers=1
scripts.ci:strict: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ci && pnpm test:e2e:ci
scripts.mvp:gate: pnpm pre-commit && pnpm test:e2e:landing && pnpm test:e2e:webapp && pnpm test:e2e:admin
scripts.deploy: echo 'Use GitHub Actions release workflow as the production deployment authority. Local scw:* scripts are wrappers/preflight only.'
scripts.deploy:landing: echo 'Use GitHub Actions release workflow. Direct local prod deploy is not the authoritative path.'
scripts.deploy:webapp: echo 'Use GitHub Actions release workflow. Direct local prod deploy is not the authoritative path.'
scripts.scw:deploy:landing:staging: echo 'Legacy landing deploy disabled. Use pnpm release:build / release:manifest:create / release:deploy.' && exit 1
scripts.scw:deploy:landing:prod: echo 'Legacy landing deploy disabled. Use pnpm release:build / release:manifest:create / release:deploy.' && exit 1
scripts.architecture:frontend: pnpm --package dependency-cruiser@16.10.4 --package typescript@5.9.3 dlx depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type err app-landing app-webapp app-admin packages
scripts.architecture:api: pnpm --package dependency-cruiser@16.10.4 --package typescript@5.9.3 dlx depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.api.cjs --output-type err app-api-ts app-connectors packages
scripts.architecture:ts-guardrails:frontend: node scripts/check-ts-guardrail-baseline.mjs --include-root app-landing --include-root app-webapp --include-root app-admin --include-root packages
scripts.architecture:repo: pnpm architecture:dependency-cruiser && pnpm architecture:knip && pnpm architecture:ts-guardrails && pnpm docs:validate:database && pnpm docs:validate:cto && pnpm docs:validate:schema-parity && pnpm docs:validate:contracts-parity
scripts.gate:architecture:frontend: pnpm architecture:frontend && pnpm architecture:knip && pnpm architecture:ts-guardrails:frontend
scripts.gate:architecture:api: pnpm architecture:api && pnpm architecture:ts-guardrails:api && pnpm docs:validate:database && pnpm docs:validate:schema-parity && pnpm docs:validate:contracts-parity
